scripts.dev: sh scripts/predev-clean.sh && concurrently -k -n web,admin,server -c cyan,yellow,magenta "bun run dev:web" "bun run dev:admin" "bun run dev:server"
scripts.db:migrate: uv run --directory server alembic upgrade head
scripts.dev:server: bun run db:migrate && uv run --directory server fastapi dev app/main.py --port 8000
scripts.build:prod: bun run build && bun run build:admin && rm -rf server/static server/static-admin && cp -r web/dist server/static && cp -r web-admin/dist server/static-admin
scripts.preview: bun run build:prod && bun run start:prod
